findings.title: Private encryptionService accessed via `as any` cast in adapters
findings.issue: Both adapters access (this.connectionService as any).encryptionService.encrypt() bypassing type safety
findings.suggestion: Add updateTokens(id, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt) to ChannelConnectionService

findings.title: OAuth callback determines channel by shop_id presence
findings.suggestion: Encode channel in OAuth state token

findings.title: Order number generation race condition
findings.suggestion: Use DB sequence or transaction with retry on conflict
findings.notes: Single-process deployment with concurrency guard minimizes risk. Tracked for future hardening.

findings.title: tick() fires-and-forgets with no error catch
OAuth state stored in-memory only
findings.suggestion: Document limitation; migrate to Redis if horizontal scaling planned
